misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo, representing Keimola Golf, stands as a seasoned and respected competitor within the Hector Trophée. The forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his ninth foray into this distinguished pair competition, a testament to his enduring commitment and skill.

Throughout his eight prior participations, Timo has cultivated an impressive legacy in the pair format, having secured the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions. This remarkable achievement underscores his exceptional ability to forge winning partnerships and navigate the complexities of team play, although the individual Victor Trophy has yet to be added to his accolades.

Beyond his competitive record, Timo is widely recognized as a dedicated ambassador for the AimPoint method, a testament to his meticulous approach to putting and the finer details of course management. This precision, combined with his strategic acumen, undoubtedly contributes to his success in the Hector Trophée, positioning him as a formidable presence whose understanding of the game's nuances makes him a player consistently poised for contention.
